texto: The reality is that the only people who count are those who believe in you no matter what. The ones who stand beside you when hell crawls through, nipping at your heels because they know who you really are.
explicacao: Citação de Joan Swan sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The reality is that the only people who count are those who believe in you no matter what. The on…” articula reflexao, paranormal-romance, reality em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
